title: a basement, anonymous addict
description: Lyrics from a basement, anonymous addict
body:
if i could write just one ill line
i would feel fine
i’ve looked, it’s been hard to find
time to start lyin
it’s the new mea-
-ning of freestylin
you never knew me
i’ve been an island
so excuse me
but this is my cypher
i’m a do me cuz if you knew me
i’d know you wouldn’t screw me
we’d already be tighter
i’m not unique-
-ly qualified to be a writer
but if you need unique
insight into my mind i’m a rider
spit shit i would die for
metaphorically speaking //of course
cop out of the decent//unforced
cuz the cops out i’m decent-
-ly likely to be sent//my choice
home without event//no force
where the world lets me vent//white noise
cuz the fathers of the rich//white boys
it’s hardly a secret, you wan yaw the ship
you must apply force
i wanna be decent
i must apply force
want the job, do the work, can’t just apply for it
too many enemies selling me justified force
in a room with two men and me, could i tell em just to fight for it
while you and me sat in the corner
claimin just and fine form
between you and me, i’m torn
i ate human meat before i’m born
it’s a huge industry, my favorite part is the porn
you wouldn’t believe what i go through in a week
just to find for-
-nication for no money
patient for the money
shot cuz it’s not like someone gone take it away from me
if i ain’t act like a dummy
act right when i do me
world might actually see through me
room to breathe and be. actually
that’s the crack pipe
little bit of rope for me to grab tight
little bit of hope for us it’s different
so we hope it’s not too different for our children
panic, lose scope, start actin indifferent
makin little decisions
that get outta control cuz what’s the big difference
between denying pain and denying existence
that’s the crack life, i ain’t tryin to live it
i’m a pass this back, aight? i’m trying to give it
up, if you ain’t, i can’t stay committed
look, i’m no saint,  the first step is admit it
my name’s billy, my life’s comfortable, i’m addicted
